Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: A sports tournament entity. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the owner of the club that owns this tournament (clubId).

clubId.description: The ID of the club that owns this tournament

Match.title: Match
Match.description: An individual match. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by users who own the club associated with this match (clubId).

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Sports club profile. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the user specified in the ownerId field.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this club

User.title: User
User.description: User profile. A user can read and write their own profile document where the document ID matches their auth.uid. Admins have global read access.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: Tournament player. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by club owners or the participant themselves.

Sponsor.title: Sponsor
Sponsor.description: Club partner. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by the club owner.

/tournaments/{tournamentId}.description: Global tournament registry. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the owner of the club associated with the clubId.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Match records. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the owner of the club associated with the clubId.

/clubs/{clubId}.description: Club profiles. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the user specified in the ownerId field.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles. A user can read and write their own document (userId == auth.uid). Admins have global read access to all users.

/participants/{participantId}.description: Tournament entries. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the club owner or the player themselves.

/sponsors/{sponsorId}.description: Club partnership details. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the club owner (clubId).
